title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!
